Repository role:

- `README.md` and `ASSESSMENT.md` are the external assessment requirements.
- `data/` is the synthetic golden fixture corpus FitGraph must contain.
- The snapshot is read-only input. Product behavior should be implemented in
  FitGraph runtime artifacts, not by editing this imported source copy.
